title: narcissus stellaris f. dianthus
intro: Narcissus stellaris f. dianthus, also known as the stellar narcissus or dianthus narcissus, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The herbal preparations of Narcissus stellaris f. dianthus include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
